overview.description: Enterprise AI and data consulting company helping businesses leverage data technologies and AI
overview.description_long: BigHub, founded in 2016 in Prague, helps enterprises transform their data into a competitive advantage. They offer AI-ready data preparation, AI strategy consulting, AI workshops, and EU AI Act compliance services. Working as a long-term partner, BigHub approaches data and AI as software — leveraging best practices such as APIs, DataOps, and MLOps. Their clients include major Czech and international enterprises across energy, insurance, retail, and manufacturing.
overview.tagline: Helping enterprises leverage AI for a data-driven edge

history.origin_story: Founded in 2016 by Karel Šimánek and Tomáš Hubínek, two friends who saw that corporations were failing to harness AI. Started with clients in Germany and the US through a partnership with GoodData, then expanded in the Czech market.

key_milestones.event: Ranked in Deloitte Fast 50 — fastest growing tech companies in Czech Republic
Reached near 100M CZK revenue milestone after 8 years (reported by euro.cz)
Expanded services to include EU AI Act compliance and Generative AI solutions

awards: Deloitte Fast 50 2022 — Among fastest growing tech companies in Czech Republic

metadata.notes: Company is likely bootstrapped — no funding rounds found. About page states '75+ experts'. Revenue reportedly near 100M CZK (~$4-5M USD) after 8 years per euro.cz article. VAT ID: CZ05388066, Company ID: 05388066.
